---
title: "All [Language] Quests"
subtitle: "Complete Quest Overview & Learning Path"
track: "trackname"
format:
  live-html:
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 2
---

::: {.hero-banner}
# 📖 All [Language] Quests

Your complete journey through [Language] programming - all quests in one place!
:::

---

## 🗺️ Quest Overview

This track contains **[X] quests** totaling approximately **[Y] hours** of learning.

::: {.progress-indicator}
**Your Progress:** [Quest tracking will be added here]
:::

---

## 📚 Foundation Quests (1-X)

Essential building blocks for [Language] programming.

::: {.quest-list}

### Quest 1: [Topic Name]
**⏱️ Time:** 10 min | **🎯 Difficulty:** Beginner | **Status:** 🟢 Ready

Learn about [brief description].

**You'll Learn:**
- Key concept 1
- Key concept 2
- Key concept 3

[Start Quest 1 →](lessons/01-topic.qmd){.btn .btn-primary .btn-sm}
[Download Notebook →](../../files/trackname/lessons/01-topic.ipynb){.btn .btn-outline .btn-sm}

---

### Quest 2: [Topic Name]
**⏱️ Time:** 15 min | **🎯 Difficulty:** Beginner | **Status:** 🟢 Ready

[Brief description]

**You'll Learn:**
- Key concept 1
- Key concept 2

[Start Quest 2 →](lessons/02-topic.qmd){.btn .btn-primary .btn-sm}
[Download Notebook →](../../files/trackname/lessons/02-topic.ipynb){.btn .btn-outline .btn-sm}

---

*[Continue pattern for all foundation quests]*

:::

---

## 🎯 Practice Quests (X-Y)

Apply your foundational knowledge through hands-on projects.

::: {.quest-list}

### Quest [N]: [Topic Name]
**⏱️ Time:** 20 min | **🎯 Difficulty:** Intermediate | **Status:** 🟢 Ready

[Description]

**You'll Build:**
- Mini-project 1
- Challenge exercise

[Start Quest →](lessons/0N-topic.qmd){.btn .btn-primary .btn-sm}

---

*[Continue for practice quests]*

:::

---

## 🚀 Advanced Quests (Y-Z)

Master complex concepts and professional techniques.

::: {.quest-list}

### Quest [N]: [Topic Name]
**⏱️ Time:** 30 min | **🎯 Difficulty:** Advanced | **Status:** 🟢 Ready

[Description]

**Advanced Topics:**
- Complex concept 1
- Professional pattern

[Start Quest →](lessons/0N-topic.qmd){.btn .btn-primary .btn-sm}

---

*[Continue for advanced quests]*

:::

---

## 📊 Learning Path Visualization

```{mermaid}
graph LR
    A[Quest 1<br/>Foundation] --> B[Quest 2<br/>Building]
    B --> C[Quest 3<br/>Practice]
    C --> D[Quest 4<br/>Patterns]
    D --> E[Quest 5<br/>Advanced]
    E --> F[Quest 6<br/>Mastery]
    
    style A fill:#10b981
    style B fill:#3b82f6
    style C fill:#8b5cf6
    style D fill:#ec4899
    style E fill:#f59e0b
    style F fill:#ef4444
```

---

## 🎯 Quest Status Legend

::: {.legend}
- 🟢 **Ready** - Quest complete and tested
- 🟡 **Beta** - Quest available, feedback welcome
- 🔴 **Coming Soon** - Under development
- ⭐ **Popular** - Highly rated by students
:::

---

## 💡 Recommended Learning Paths

::: {.learning-paths}

### Path 1: Complete Beginner
**For absolute beginners to programming**

1. Start with [Getting Started Guide](../../intro/what-is-cs.qmd)
2. Complete Foundation Quests 1-X in order
3. Practice with challenges after each quest
4. Move to Practice Quests once comfortable

**Estimated time:** X weeks (1-2 hours/day)

---

### Path 2: Quick Learner
**For those with programming experience in another language**

1. Skim Foundation Quests 1-3
2. Deep dive into language-specific features (Quests 4-X)
3. Focus on Practice and Advanced Quests
4. Build your own projects alongside

**Estimated time:** X weeks (2-3 hours/day)

---

### Path 3: Specific Topics
**For targeted learning**

Jump directly to quests covering topics you need:
- [Topic 1] → Quest X
- [Topic 2] → Quest Y
- [Topic 3] → Quest Z

:::

---

## 📥 Bulk Downloads

Download all quest materials at once:

::: {.download-options}
- [📓 All Notebooks (.zip)](../../files/trackname/all-notebooks.zip)
- [📄 All PDFs (.zip)](../../files/trackname/all-pdfs.zip)
- [💻 All Source Code (.zip)](../../files/trackname/all-code.zip)
- [🎓 Complete Track Bundle (.zip)](../../files/trackname/complete-track.zip)
:::

---

## 🎓 Quest Completion Checklist

Track your progress:

### Foundation
- [ ] Quest 1: [Topic]
- [ ] Quest 2: [Topic]
- [ ] Quest 3: [Topic]
- *[etc.]*

### Practice
- [ ] Quest X: [Topic]
- [ ] Quest Y: [Topic]
- *[etc.]*

### Advanced
- [ ] Quest Z: [Topic]
- *[etc.]*

---

## 🏆 Milestones & Achievements

::: {.achievements}

### 🌟 Foundation Master
Complete all Foundation Quests (1-X)

### 🎯 Practice Champion
Complete all Practice Quests (X-Y)

### 🚀 Track Complete
Finish all quests in the track

### ⚔️ Quest Warrior
Complete track with all bonus challenges

:::

---

## 💪 Challenge Yourself

### Optional Extensions

Each quest includes:
- 🎯 **Basic Challenge** - Test fundamental understanding
- 🔥 **Advanced Challenge** - Push your skills further
- 🏆 **Bonus Project** - Apply concepts creatively

Try to complete at least the basic challenges for each quest!

---

## 📚 Additional Resources

### Complementary Learning
- [Track Setup Guide](setup.qmd)
- [Interactive Coding Environment](interactive.qmd)
- [Practice Exercises](exercises.qmd)
- [Track FAQ](faq.qmd)

### External Resources
- Official [Language] Documentation
- [Language] Style Guide
- Community Forums
- Recommended Books

---

## ➡️ Ready to Start?

::: {.cta-section}

### Begin Your Quest Journey!

[🚀 Start Quest 1](lessons/01-first-topic.qmd){.btn .btn-primary .btn-lg}

Or jump to a specific quest using the links above.

:::

---

## 🤝 Study Tips

::: {.tip-box}

### Maximize Your Learning

1. **Sequential Learning** - Complete quests in order for best results
2. **Practice Daily** - Consistency beats intensity
3. **Code Along** - Type every example yourself
4. **Experiment** - Break things and learn from errors
5. **Review** - Revisit earlier quests when concepts connect
6. **Build Projects** - Apply learning to your own ideas
7. **Help Others** - Teaching reinforces understanding

:::

---

::: {.footer-navigation}

[← Back to Track Home](index.qmd) | [Next: Setup Guide →](setup.qmd)

:::
